text: Secure sustainable Q4 funding for Aimparency
description: Build a durable Q4 funding pipeline beyond the August bridge: submit the Prototype Fund application, monitor genuinely relevant AI/open-source calls, strengthen public-interest evidence and user traction, and decide the legal/IP structure without accidentally making individual/GbR grants unavailable. Success is at least one high-quality grant application plus an investable evidence package by year end.

status.comment: Q4 container created; October Prototype Fund track is the primary grant path.
